ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the company was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the employee works for */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee lives */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the employee lives */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee within the company */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" TEXT /* Cost of the service */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the service */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service (e.g., tree care, land services) */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is currently available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the service details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_services" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company offering the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being offered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the service offered by the company */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount offered by the company for the service */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is available from the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_services" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee offering the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being offered */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the employee for the service */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the employee for the service */,
  "last_performed" TEXT /* Date the employee last performed the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the customer is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Customer status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the inquiry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being inquired about */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was resolved */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the request */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the service was completed */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the request */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the service */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the customer for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the account (e.g., employee, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)
